shared_properties: The panel uses a tall right-side footprint that keeps the village visible while queue planning is active.
Core palette fields remain fixed at primary #111111, background #000000, and accent #FFFFFF.
Card slots and button wells are spaced for mouse interaction on a 1920x1080 screen.
differences: The panel contains queue slots, drag handles, undo space, and a confirm footer for the planning phase.
High-contrast slot frames make item order easy to scan in grayscale-only presentation.
The confirm footer remains heavier and brighter than the surrounding queue slots to highlight progression.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the winter survival loop, queue-memory mechanic, building roster, and 1920x1080 Bevy target.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the monochrome blizzard mood, Viking settlement silhouettes, and snow density targets.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Static UI panel rendered on the right side during planning, with dynamic queue cards layered inside authored slots.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/art_000016.png during UI boot and attach it to a right-side panel node that stays fixed through planning.
runtime_notes: Keep slot anchors exposed through layout metadata so queue card entities can snap precisely into each row.
Use the authored confirm footer as a visual target while interactive text and icons are layered at runtime.
Hide the panel when memory and result phases begin so the center field regains space.

context.usage: Right-side planning panel used to build, reorder, and confirm the winter resource queue.

shape.silhouette: Tall panel with ordered card slots, drag-handle margins, and a strong confirm footer block.

acceptance_criteria: PNG canvas is exactly 420x560px with at least seven clearly separated queue slots.
The confirm footer is visibly brighter than the queue slot interiors.
Drag-handle margins and slot borders remain readable at 1x scale in grayscale only.
